apihelp-edit-param-editorinterface: Nomine del interfacie de editor usate (p.ex. MobileFrontend-SourceEditor)
apihelp-parse-param-mobileformat: Retornar le resultato del analyse syntactic in un formato apte pro apparatos mobile.
apihelp-parse-param-noimages: Disactivar imagines in le rendition mobile.
apihelp-parse-param-mainpage: Applicar transformationes del pagina principal pro apparatos mobile.
apihelp-webapp-manifest-summary: Retorna un manifesto de application web.
